steps.title: Use the dolphin ID
steps.content: The question asks for the recording year tied to dolphin ID FB43. In the table, the ID is the lookup key; the row for FB43 provides the year.

steps.title: Check the years
steps.content: A and C name years not tied to FB43. B belongs to a different dolphin ID, FB07. The row for FB43 lists 1992. The answer is D.
